name: Sync Engine
summary: Backend sync engine that scans project code, analyzes structure, and generates spec nodes
goals: Scan project source code and generate corresponding spec nodes
Support incremental sync by detecting changed files

specDetail.description: The sync-engine module that orchestrates the spec synchronization process. Scans source directories, analyzes file structure, determines node hierarchy, generates spec JSON, and persists results to graph storage.

parameters.name: changedFiles
parameters.description: List of changed files for incremental sync (auto-detected if empty)

parameters.name: options
parameters.description: Sync options including exclude patterns and depth limits

constraints: Must complete full sync within 5 minutes for projects with up to 1000 source files
Must preserve manually edited spec content during incremental sync
Must generate valid JSON spec files conforming to the schema

acceptanceCriteria.given: a project with source code files
acceptanceCriteria.then: all source files are scanned and a complete spec tree is generated with proper hierarchy

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: docs(sync-specs): implement leaf determination redesign with frontend/backend criteria
